cafe_metadata.name: Akira's Star-View Lounge
cafe_metadata.motto: Where every sip is a trip to the stars.

signature_hot_drinks.name: 1314 Eternal Latte
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Velvety espresso with rose-infused milk and edible silver leaf.

signature_hot_drinks.name: 108 Zen Mocha
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Ceremonial matcha meeting dark cocoa in a timeless, balanced blend.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Caramel Cloud Macchiato
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Espresso topped with salted caramel drizzle like a sunset cloud.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Velvet Rose Cappuccino
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Silky foam dusted with dried organic rose petals.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Golden Honey Flat White
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Wildflower honey swirled into rich, micro-foamed milk.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Spiced Amber Americano
signature_hot_drinks.desc: A bold shot with hints of cinnamon and star anise.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Midnight Truffle Coffee
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Dark roast blended with savory black truffle cocoa.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Hazelnut Horizon
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Toasted hazelnuts meet a medium roast for a nutty finish.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Vanilla Bean Dream
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Creamy espresso speckled with real Madagascar vanilla bean.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Toasted Almond Cortado
signature_hot_drinks.desc: A powerful short drink with smoky charred almond notes.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Pistachio Praline Latte
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Sweet pistachio butter swirled into a caffeinated masterpiece.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Lavender Haze Mocha
signature_hot_drinks.desc: White chocolate and lavender for a dreamy, purple-hued sip.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Cardamom Comet
signature_hot_drinks.desc: A spicy, aromatic latte inspired by ancient spice routes.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Maple Moonrise
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Grade A maple syrup layered with dark, intense espresso.

signature_hot_drinks.name: Toffee Twilight
signature_hot_drinks.desc: Buttery toffee bits melted into a rich, steaming latte.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Frozen 1314 Espresso
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Blended espresso crystals that stay cold until the end of time.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Iced 108 Matcha Fusion
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Chilled matcha layered over espresso for a balanced energy boost.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Cold Brew Cascade
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Steeped for 24 hours and served over a single giant ice sphere.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Salted Caramel Iced Latte
signature_cold_drinks.desc: The perfect mix of sea salt, sweet caramel, and chilled milk.

signature_cold_drinks.name: White Choco Iced Mocha
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Silky white chocolate over ice, topped with whipped starlight.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Coconut Cream Cold Brew
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Tropical coconut milk foam floating atop our signature roast.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Brown Sugar Shaken Espresso
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Vigorously shaken for a frothy, caramelized texture.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Iced Irish Cream Coffee
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Non-alcoholic creaminess with a hint of toasted malt.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Minty Mocha Chill
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Fresh garden mint meets rich chocolate in a frosty glass.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Berry Blitz Iced Coffee
signature_cold_drinks.desc: A surprising pop of muddled berries in a bright, acidic brew.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Iced Peppermint Patty
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Cooling peppermint and dark chocolate shards over ice.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Tiramisu Iced Latte
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Mascarpone flavored milk layered with espresso and cocoa.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Chilled Chai Espresso
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Spicy black tea meets a double shot of espresso over ice.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Nitro Nebula
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Nitrogen-infused coffee for a naturally creamy, velvet pour.

signature_cold_drinks.name: Iced Honeycomb Latte
signature_cold_drinks.desc: Real honeycomb chunks melting into a chilled vanilla latte.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Gold Leaf Cappuccino
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: Luxury in a cup, topped with 24k edible gold flakes.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Saffron Silk Latte
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: Rare saffron threads give this drink a royal yellow glow.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Smoked Cinnamon Mocha
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: Served under a glass dome filled with applewood smoke.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Rose Quartz Macchiato
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: A pink-hued delight that tastes like a sweet, floral hug.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Dark Forest Espresso
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: Cherry syrup and dark chocolate shavings; dessert in a shot.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Ruby Velvet Latte
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: Made with rare ruby cocoa for a naturally tart kick.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Maple Pecan Reserve
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: Small-batch maple syrup and toasted pecan butter.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Crème Brûlée Coffee
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: Topped with a sugar crust that you can crack with a spoon.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Black Diamond Mocha
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: Activated charcoal and intense 90% cacao blend.

fancy_hot_drinks.name: Tahitian Vanilla Breve
fancy_hot_drinks.desc: The richest cream steamed with rare Tahitian vanilla.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Galaxy Iced Latte
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: A nebula of butterfly pea tea and espresso swirling together.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Sparkling Espresso Tonic
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: Fizzy, botanical, and incredibly refreshing under the sun.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Blueberry Bliss Iced Mocha
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: A fruity twist on a classic, layered for a beautiful gradient.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Cloud Top Cold Brew
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: Cold brew capped with a thick, salted vanilla foam layer.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Charcoal Velvet Iced Latte
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: Activated charcoal gives this a sleek, black aesthetic.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Holographic Vanilla Chill
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: Edible glitter makes this drink shimmer like the stars.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Orchid Infused Iced Coffee
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: Light, airy, and perfumed with the scent of wild orchids.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Peach Blossom Cold Brew
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: A sweet, stone-fruit finish to our smoothest cold brew.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Iced Baklava Latte
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: Honey, pistachio, and cinnamon milk with a cold espresso kick.

fancy_cold_drinks.name: Lunar Lemon Espresso
fancy_cold_drinks.desc: A sharp, citrusy cold brew with a lemon-zest infused foam.

coolers.name: Mojito Mint Cooler
coolers.desc: Fresh lime and muddled garden mint.

coolers.name: Blue Lagoon
coolers.desc: Curacao-style syrup with a fizzy finish.

coolers.name: Strawberry Fizz
coolers.desc: Sparkling water with fresh berry puree.

coolers.name: Green Apple Zing
coolers.desc: Tart apple with a sparkling kick.

coolers.name: Wild Berry Blast
coolers.desc: A mix of four mountain berries.

sandwiches.name: Skyline Club
sandwiches.desc: Triple decker with turkey and bacon.

pizzas.name: BBQ Comet
pizzas.desc: Chicken, red onion, and smoky sauce.

burgers.name: Bacon Blackhole
burgers.desc: Wrapped in bacon and deep fried.

ramen.name: Miso Moon
ramen.desc: Rich miso with corn and butter.
